sections.title: If the player has spoken to Solztun

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Hello there. You look lost, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I travelled to the bottom of the stronghold, and I emerge victorious!

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Well done! You didn't happen to find my brother?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About that...

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: I sense bad news. It's okay, he's been gone so long. I believe I've moved on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at least he died doing what he loved.

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: True, I will raise a drink for him tonight, he was a good man, even if he was a pacifist.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As will I. See you around, Litara.

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Goodbye, [player name].

sections.title: If the player has already informed her of the fate of Solztun

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Hello there. You look lost, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I travelled to the bottom of the stronghold, and I emerge victorious!

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: I am glad the challenges of the stronghold have been overcome; it feels like my brother has somehow been avenged.

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Hello there. You look lost, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a stronghold or something...

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Ahh... the Stronghold of Security. It's down there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks kind of... deep and dark.

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Yeah... tell that to my brother, he still hasn't come back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your brother?

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: He's an explorer too. When the miner fell down that hole he'd made and came back babbling about doors, questions and treasure, my brother went to explore. No-one has seen him since.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... that's not good.

lines.speaker: Litara
lines.text: Lots of people have been down there, but none of them have seen him, Let me know if you do, will you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll certainly keep my eyes open.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, just passing through.
